$comment: Judgement Agent — GP test (S0) config. Telegram-only, single model.
$comment_channels: Telegram channel config lives in ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json on the server (has botToken + group IDs). Do NOT duplicate here.

cron.task: Pull current FDV for all SIGNAL/TRADE tokens from GeckoTerminal and update token_performance table in Supabase. Calculate 1d/7d/14d performance vs signal-time FDV.
Compile daily digest: today's evaluations summary, acceptance rate, notable scores, points settlement. Post to team review channel.
Check all DB_SAVE tokens from last 14 days against any SIGNAL/TRADE actions from any pipeline. If match found, retroactively upgrade original scout points and log to digest.
